businessSummary.oneLiner: Government & commercial AI data analytics platform leader — three-pillar structure of Gotham (defense), Foundry (enterprise), and AIP (AI platform)
businessSummary.description: Palantir provides data integration, analytics, and AI decision-making platforms for government and commercial organizations. FY2025 revenue $4.48B (+70% YoY), adjusted operating margin 57%. Friday close $150.95 (-1.66%). Declined with market weakness. Jointly announced sovereign AI data center architecture with NVIDIA. Major mission-critical AI partnerships signed with GE Aerospace, Centrus Energy, and more. YTD -14.7%. Market cap $361.0B, P/E ~244x, Forward P/E ~116x.
howTheyMakeMoney: Government contracts: Gotham/Apollo — defense, intelligence agencies, NATO (~55% of revenue)
Commercial contracts: Foundry/AIP — enterprise AI platform, Boot Camp strategy (~45% of revenue)
SaaS model: Annual subscriptions + expansion-based. Net Dollar Retention 120%+

keyMetrics.name: P/E (TTM)
keyMetrics.interpretation: Extremely high valuation. AI + defense premium

keyMetrics.name: Operating Margin
keyMetrics.interpretation: High profitability. SaaS model leverage effect

growthDrivers.title: NVIDIA + Palantir Sovereign AI Data Center Architecture Announced
growthDrivers.description: Yahoo Finance (3/13): Turnkey sovereign AI data center co-announced. GE Aerospace, Centrus Energy, Ondas, World View, LG CNS adopting Palantir AIP + NVIDIA infrastructure.

growthDrivers.title: Multiple Mission-Critical AI Partnerships Signed — Defense, Energy, Manufacturing
growthDrivers.description: 3/13: Multi-year contracts with GE Aerospace (defense), Centrus Energy (nuclear), Ondas (drones), World View (stratosphere). AIP industry penetration accelerating.

growthDrivers.title: 24/7 Wall St: 'Down -27% — Breakdown or Buying Opportunity?'
growthDrivers.description: 3/12: YTD -14.7%, -27% from ATH. Digesting valuation but structural growth accelerating. Possible rebound starting point.

growthDrivers.title: US Commercial Segment +137% YoY — AIP Bootcamp Success
growthDrivers.description: Q4 2025 earnings: US commercial revenue +137% YoY. 5-day bootcamp → enterprise-wide expansion strategy delivering explosive results.

competitiveAdvantage.summary: 20+ years of government/defense AI track record. Security clearance levels create entry barriers. 'Ontology' platform as the unique AI-human collaboration interface moat.

moats.description: Highest security clearance from US DoD and intelligence agencies. Competitors cannot enter.
'Tool factory' for AI/human agents. Unique in battlefield planning and target identification.
5-day intensive pilot for customer acquisition, then enterprise-wide expansion. High conversion rates.

competitors.name: Microsoft (Azure AI)
competitors.detail: Cloud AI platform. General approach vs Palantir's specialized analytics

competitors.name: Snowflake
competitors.detail: Data lakehouse. Partial overlap in analytics

competitors.name: C3.ai
competitors.detail: Enterprise AI competitor. Inferior in scale and profitability

competitors.name: Anduril
competitors.detail: Defense AI startup. Fast-growing but small vs Palantir

recentNews.headline: NVIDIA + Palantir Sovereign AI Data Center Architecture Co-Announced
recentNews.significance: AI infrastructure (NVIDIA) + AI platform (Palantir) combination. Core government/defense market partnership.

recentNews.headline: GE Aerospace, Centrus, Ondas Sign Mission-Critical AI Partnerships
recentNews.significance: AIP penetration rapidly expanding into defense, energy, manufacturing, and prediction markets.

recentNews.headline: 24/7 Wall St: 'Palantir Down -27% — Collapse or Buying Opportunity?'
recentNews.significance: Significant correction from ATH with valuation digestion in progress. Structural growth accelerating.

recentNews.headline: Seeking Alpha: 'Q4 Earnings — Short-Term Pain for Long-Term Gain'
recentNews.significance: Despite Q4 revenue +36.4% and net income +255%, guidance concerns weighed on shares. Long-term growth investment strategy.

recentNews.headline: eand.co: 'AIP to Revolutionize 2026 Portfolio' — US Commercial +137% YoY
recentNews.significance: AIP bootcamp strategy delivering explosive enterprise customer acquisition. Commercial revenue surging.

analystOpinions.notableComment: Buy consensus with $192.68 target (+28%). NVIDIA sovereign AI partnership and US commercial +137% growth are key bull cases. Valuation (P/E 244x) is the biggest risk.

risks.title: P/E 244x — Valuation Bubble Debate
risks.description: $4.48B revenue with $361B market cap. Severe derating risk if growth slows.

risks.title: Stock-Based Compensation (SBC) — YoY +4.67% Dilution
risks.description: High stock-based compensation continues diluting existing shareholder value.

risks.title: CEO Karp's Political Statement Risks
risks.description: Defense/political commentary may concern ESG investors and some clients.

risks.title: Competition Intensifying — Microsoft, Anduril
risks.description: Azure AI and Anduril entering defense AI market challenge monopoly position.

buyReasons.title: NVIDIA Sovereign AI Partnership — Infrastructure + Platform Combination
buyReasons.rationale: Turnkey data center architecture with world's largest AI chip company. Accelerating government/defense market dominance.

buyReasons.title: US Commercial +137% YoY — AIP Explosive Growth
buyReasons.rationale: Bootcamp strategy maximizing enterprise customer conversion. Commercial revenue share rapidly expanding.

buyReasons.title: -27% from ATH — Valuation Digestion in Progress
buyReasons.rationale: Dropped from $207.52 to $150.95. Discount buying opportunity for a +70% growth company.

buyReasons.title: FCF Margin 46.94% — Best-in-Class SaaS Cash Conversion
buyReasons.rationale: $2.1B FCF strengthening financial position. Virtually debt-free balance sheet.

overallOpinion: Palantir's structural growth is accelerating with the NVIDIA sovereign AI data center partnership and mission-critical contracts with GE/Centrus. US commercial +137% growth proves AIP's explosive power.
However, P/E 244x and Forward P/E 116x price in 'perfect execution.' Down -27% from ATH but still historically expensive. Trading below both 50-day and 200-day moving averages.

GTC 2026 will spotlight the NVIDIA infrastructure + Palantir platform combination. Long-term essential company for AI defense/enterprise analytics, but only suitable for investors who can tolerate valuation risk.
